originalPrompt: Framework: Express, Port: 4445, Styling: Tailwind CSS; Request: hello world with frontend backend and logic to click add delete and update things, minimal but functional and interactive.

subtasks.title: Initialize Express project
subtasks.description: Create a new Node project, install Express and dev tools, and set up basic folder structure for backend and frontend.
subtasks.successCriteria: package.json exists with express installed and a clean src/public structure ready.

subtasks.title: Configure server to listen on port 4445
subtasks.description: Create an Express app entry (e.g., src/server.js), set it to listen on port 4445, and serve static files from public.
subtasks.successCriteria: Server starts without errors and responds on http://localhost:4445.

subtasks.title: Install and configure Tailwind CSS
subtasks.description: Install tailwindcss, postcss, and autoprefixer, initialize config files, set content paths, and add a build script to output CSS.
subtasks.successCriteria: Tailwind CSS compiles successfully and styles apply to a test element in public/index.html.

subtasks.title: Design in-memory item model
subtasks.description: Create a simple in-memory array store with items having id, text, and createdAt, plus utility functions to add, update, delete, and list.
subtasks.successCriteria: Utility functions work by unit testing or manual invocation with predictable outputs and unique ids.

subtasks.title: Implement CRUD API endpoints
subtasks.description: Add Express routes for GET /api/items, POST /api/items, PUT /api/items/:id, and DELETE /api/items/:id using the in-memory store.
subtasks.successCriteria: All four endpoints return correct JSON responses and proper status codes for happy and error paths.

subtasks.title: Build minimal Tailwind frontend
subtasks.description: Create public/index.html with a styled header, input form, and list container, and add basic layout using Tailwind classes.
subtasks.successCriteria: Page renders with Tailwind styling and visible form and list elements in the browser.

subtasks.title: Connect frontend interactions to API
subtasks.description: Write client-side JS to fetch items on load, handle add via POST, update via PUT, and delete via DELETE with interactive UI updates.
subtasks.successCriteria: Users can add, update, and delete items from the UI and see changes without refreshing the page.

subtasks.title: Test, refine, and document run scripts
subtasks.description: Add npm scripts for dev (server and Tailwind watch), fix any bugs, and verify end-to-end functionality on port 4445.
subtasks.successCriteria: Single npm command starts the app; manual tests confirm CRUD works and UI remains responsive and styled.

decompositionStrategy: Top-down functional decomposition integrating backend CRUD with a minimal Tailwind frontend.
